name: Bedsure Sherpa Fleece Throw Blanket
description: Bedsure Sherpa Fleece Throw Blanket - Reversible velvet flannel top and sherpa reverse. 220 GSM flannel, 260 GSM sherpa. Machine washable, lightweight yet warm. Multiple colors and sizes.

name: Honeywell HT-900 TurboForce Fan
description: Honeywell TurboForce Fan - 3 speeds, 90-degree pivot. Aerodynamic design for whole room circulation. Quiet operation, energy efficient. Perfect for desk or floor.

name: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides
description: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides - Grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine collagen. 20g per serving. Unflavored, dissolves easily. Supports hair, skin, nails, joints. Paleo and Whole30 approved.

name: Best Friends by Sheri Donut Cuddler Bed
description: The Original Donut Cuddler - Round shape with deep crevices for burrowing. Self-warming faux fur. Non-skid bottom. Machine washable. Multiple sizes and colors.

name: Fancii LED Vanity Mirror 10x
description: Fancii Trifold LED Vanity - Adjustable brightness, 3 color modes. Detachable 10x magnifying mirror. Touch controls, 180-degree rotation. Battery or USB powered.

name: Wise Owl Outfitters Camping Hammock
description: Wise Owl Hammock - Heavy duty 210T parachute nylon. Tree straps and carabiners included. Grapefruit size packed. Supports 400-500 lbs. Perfect for camping or backyard.

name: PurSteam Handheld Steamer
description: PurSteam Handheld Steamer - Heats in 25 seconds, 10 minutes continuous steam. 1200W power. Safe for all fabrics including silk. Includes fabric brush. Lightweight and portable.

name: YETI Rambler 20 oz Tumbler
description: YETI Rambler Tumblers - Double-wall vacuum insulation. 18/8 stainless steel, no sweat design. MagSlider lid. BPA-free, dishwasher safe. Multiple colors and sizes.

name: Anker Wireless Charger Pad
description: Anker PowerWave Wireless Charger - 10W fast charging for Samsung, 7.5W for iPhone. LED indicator, temperature control, surge protection. Case-friendly up to 5mm thick.

name: Gaiam Essentials Thick Yoga Mat
description: Gaiam Essentials Yoga Mat - 2/5 inch thick cushioning. Non-slip texture. Ideal for all types of yoga and floor exercises. Easy to clean. Multiple color options.

name: Hamilton Beach Electric Kettle
description: Hamilton Beach Electric Kettle - 1.7 liter capacity. Boils water quickly with LED light. Auto shutoff, boil dry protection. Cord-free serving. Easy-to-view water window.

name: TOZO T6 Bluetooth Earbuds
description: TOZO T6 True Wireless Earbuds - Bluetooth 5.3, IPX8 waterproof, 45 hours total playtime with charging case. Touch controls, one-step pairing. Premium deep bass.

name: The Ordinary Niacinamide Serum
description: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% - High-strength vitamin and mineral formula. Reduces blemishes and congestion. Oil-free. Affordable effective skincare.

name: Furhaven Orthopedic Dog Bed
description: Furhaven Orthopedic Pet Bed - Egg-crate foam base. Plush faux fur sleep surface. Step-on design easy for pets. Ideal for pets with arthritis or joint issues. Machine washable.

name: Yankee Candle Large Jar Candle
description: Yankee Candle Large Jar - 110-150 hours burn time. Premium paraffin grade wax delivers clear scent. Classic design. Multiple fragrances available.

name: Matein Travel Laptop Backpack
description: Matein Travel Backpack - Water resistant, fits 15.6 inch laptop. USB charging port. Anti-theft pocket. Multiple compartments. Padded shoulder straps. Great for business travel.

name: Levoit Himalayan Salt Lamp
description: Levoit Salt Lamp - 100% authentic Himalyan salt. Touch dimmer switch adjusts brightness. Safe UL-listed cord and bulb. Unique crystal patterns on every lamp.

name: Takeya Cold Brew Coffee Maker
description: Takeya Cold Brew Maker - 1 quart, fine-mesh coffee filter. Makes smooth cold brew concentrate. BPA-free Tritan pitcher. Airtight seal for freshness. Easy to clean.

name: Hydro Flask Standard Mouth Bottle
description: Hydro Flask Standard Mouth - Double-wall vacuum insulated. TempShield insulation keeps drinks cold for 24 hours, hot for 12. 18/8 pro-grade stainless steel. BPA-free.

name: Fit Simplify Resistance Bands
description: Fit Simplify Exercise Bands - Set of 5 different resistance levels. 100% natural latex. Includes instruction guide and carry bag. Perfect for strength training, stretching, physical therapy.

name: Quinn Snacks Microwave Popcorn
description: Quinn Snacks Organic Popcorn - Non-GMO, gluten-free. No preservatives or artificial ingredients. Compostable microwave bag. Farm-to-bag traceability. Multiple flavors.

name: Eufy RoboVac 11S
description: Eufy RoboVac 11S - Super-thin 2.85 profile. Quiet operation, powerful suction. Self-charging. Drop-sensing technology. Great for hard floors and medium-pile carpets. Includes remote control.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
description: Instant Pot Duo - 7 appliances in 1: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, warmer. 13 smart programs. 6 quart capacity. Stainless steel.

name: Ninja Air Fryer AF101
description: Ninja AF101 Air Fryer - 4 quart capacity. Air fry, roast, reheat, dehydrate. Up to 75% less fat than traditional frying. Ceramic-coated nonstick basket. Dishwasher safe parts.

name: JBL Flip 5 Waterproof Speaker
description: JBL Flip 5 - Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker. 12 hours playtime. PartyBoost feature pairs multiple speakers. IPX7 waterproof. Premium sound quality. Multiple colors.

name: Rexing V1 Dash Cam
description: Rexing V1 Dash Cam - 4K Ultra HD recording. 170 degree wide angle. G-sensor, loop recording, parking monitor. WiFi connectivity. Discreet design. Includes 16GB microSD card.

name: ThermoPro TP03 Digital Thermometer
description: ThermoPro TP03 - Digital instant-read meat thermometer. 3-5 second response time. Accurate to ±0.9°F. Backlit LCD display. Foldaway probe. BBQ, cooking, candy, brewing applications.

name: MZOO Sleep Eye Mask
description: MZOO Sleep Mask - 100% blackout. 3D contoured design doesn't touch eyes. Memory foam, adjustable strap. Ideal for travel, shift work, meditation. Includes ear plugs and carrying case.

name: Anker PowerCore 10000
description: Anker PowerCore 10000 - Ultra-compact portable charger. 10000mAh capacity. Charges iPhone 8 three times. PowerIQ and VoltageBoost technologies. Certified safe with multi-protection.

name: Beckham Hotel Collection Pillows
description: Beckham Hotel Gel Pillows - Queen size set of 2. Gel fiber filling stays cool. No-shift construction. Hypoallergenic, dust mite resistant. Luxury hotel quality. 250 thread count cover. Machine washable.
